---
title: "Vodič · Instrumenti državne intervencije"
toc: false
number-sections: false
lang: hr-HR
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-classes: vd-page
---

```{=html}
<div class="vd-dio-4">

<div class="vd-folio">
  <div class="vd-folio-left">
    <a class="vd-back" href="../vodic.html">← Vodič</a>
    <span class="vd-folio-chapter">Dio IV · Poglavlje 12 · Instrumenti intervencije</span>
  </div>
  <div class="vd-folio-meta">
    <span>2 min čitanja</span>
    <span>Mapa 12 od 20</span>
  </div>
</div>

<h1 class="vd-question">Koje alate država ima u&nbsp;rukama?</h1>

<div class="vd-map">
  <ol class="vd-branches" aria-label="Šest ideja poglavlja o instrumentima">

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#čime-država-djeluje">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14.5 6.5a4 4 0 0 0-5.6 5L4 16.4V20h3.6l4.9-4.9a4 4 0 0 0 5-5.6L14.6 12l-2.6-2.6 2.5-2.9Z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Od cilja do alata</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Cilj nije politika dok se ne odabere instrument i osigura provedba.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#porezi">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M14.5 8.5c-.5-1-1.5-1.5-2.5-1.5-1.5 0-2.5 1-2.5 2.2 0 2.8 5 1.6 5 4.4 0 1.2-1 2.2-2.5 2.2-1.2 0-2.2-.6-2.7-1.6"/><path d="M12 5.5V7m0 10v1.5"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Novac kao poluga</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Porezi, potrošnja, subvencije i transferi mijenjaju ponašanje kroz džep.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#regulacija">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="4" y="3" width="16" height="18" rx="1"/><path d="M8 7h8M8 11h8M8 15h5"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Pravila i standardi</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Regulacija djeluje bez novca, ali nosi troškove usklađivanja i rizik zarobljavanja.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#javna-poduzeća">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 21V10l5 3v-3l5 3v-3l6 3.5V21"/><path d="M3 21h18"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Država kao proizvođač</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Javna poduzeća i agencije pružaju izravno ono gdje tržište ne staje.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#bihevioralni-i-nudge-instrumenti">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h9"/><path d="M11 8l4 4-4 4"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="2.5"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Gurkanje umjesto prisile</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Zadane opcije i informacije mijenjaju izbore bez zabrana i nameta.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#kombiniranje-instrumenata">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="5.5"/><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="5.5"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Pravi miks</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Izbor i kombinacija alata ovise o problemu. Svaki nosi vlastite troškove i uvjete.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

  </ol>
</div>

<div class="vd-cards">

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Politika u praksi</span>
    <p>Britanska Kolumbija od 2008. oporezuje ugljik umjesto da propisuje tehnologije, a prihod vraća kroz niže poreze na dohodak i dobit.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#porezi">Poglavlje 12 · Porezi kao instrument</a>
  </div>

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Jedna brojka</span>
    <span class="vd-big">9/10</span>
    <p>Toliko zaposlenih štedi za mirovinu kad je upis automatski. Uz ručnu prijavu, otprilike polovica.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#bihevioralni-i-nudge-instrumenti">Poglavlje 12 · Nudge instrumenti</a>
  </div>

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Mit i stvarnost</span>
    <p class="vd-mit"><span class="vd-tag">Mit</span>Najjači alat države je zabrana.</p>
    <p class="vd-stvar"><span class="vd-tag">Stvarnost</span>Porez na ugljik ili pametna zadana opcija često postignu više od zabrane, uz manji trošak i otpor.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html#kombiniranje-instrumenata">Poglavlje 12 · Kombiniranje alata</a>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="vd-pojam">
  <span class="vd-pojam-label">Pojam za razgovor</span>
  <p><span class="vd-pojam-term">nudge</span> <span class="vd-pojam-text">Mali gurkalj. Zadana opcija koja promijeni izbor bez zabrane i bez troška.</span></p>
</div>

<nav class="vd-dalje" aria-label="Kamo dalje">
  <a href="11-konstitucionalna-ekonomika.html">← Mapa 11</a>
  <a class="vd-primary" href="../chapters/12-instrumenti.html">Otvorite poglavlje u knjizi</a>
  <a href="13-javna-potrosnja.html">Mapa 13 →</a>
</nav>

</div>
```
